headline: Retailers see surge in petite sizes as plus-size demand cools
summary: Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Brooke DiPalma and Senior Business Reporter Ines Ferre join Josh Lipton on Market Domination to discuss the growing demand for petite apparel and the slowdown in plus-size clothing sales as the rise of GLP-1 weight-loss drugs reshapes consumer shopping habits

headline: Women run a record 11.2% of Fortune 500 companies in 2026—but the gain came in a year of high-profile exits
summary: Internal promotions and outside hires helped the Fortune 500 notch more women CEOs.
